gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/252)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/252)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّا إِذَا قَدِمْنَا مَكَّةَ ذَهَبَ أَصْحَابُنَا يَطُوفُونَ وَ يَتْرُكُونِّي أَحْفَظُ مَتَاعَهُمْ قَالَ أَنْتَ أَعْظَمُهُمْ أَجْراً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ismail Al Khash’amy who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘When we arrived in Makkah, our companions went to perform Tawaaf, and left me to guard their provisions’. Heasws said: ‘You are greater than them in Recompense’.
en.sarwar: 26. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Isma‘il af-Khath’amiy who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘When we arrived in Makkah, our people went for Tawaf and left me to look after their belongings . 5 He (the Imam) said, ‘Your reward is the greatest among them.’”
